svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="figure-4-3-face-quality-flow" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-629" dy="-141" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="读取视频帧或图文图片" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="InsightFace
检测候选人脸" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="340" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="质量检查
是否合格" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="150" x="640" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="提取并归一化
embedding" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="900" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="保存人脸图、完整帧和数据库记录" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="900" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="记录过滤原因
不进入索引" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="190" x="620" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=14;" value="质量指标
min_face_size
min_face_ratio
min_laplacian_var
max_pose_deviation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="190" x="340" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="5" value="通过"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="7" value="不通过"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#333333;fontColor=#000000;fontFamily=SimSun;fontSize=12;" target="6" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
